settings.quote: The craftsmanship is unreal — the wooden chest is now a keepsake on our mantel. Truly not just a gift.
settings.author: Aanya M.

settings.quote: We sent 200 corporate hampers and every client called to say thank you. Flawless from order to delivery.
settings.author: Rahul S.

settings.quote: Personalised, elegant and packed with love. Zariya made our gifting effortless and memorable.
settings.author: Priya & Co.

settings.inside_box:
• Hand-carved wooden keepsake chest with signature Zariya House plaque
  • Intricately crafted brass elephant figurine, symbolising wisdom, strength and good fortune
  • Traditional brass diya to bring warmth and light to every celebration
  • Handcrafted Ajrakh stole, celebrating the timeless beauty of Indian textile traditions
  • Handmade artisanal chocolates for a sweet indulgence
  • Signature Zariya House bookmark featuring Indian heritage-inspired artwork
  • Curated story card sharing the inspiration behind the collection
  • Signature Zariya House scroll and keepsake details
settings.delivery_text: Ready-to-ship collections are typically dispatched within 5–7 business days. As many pieces are handcrafted, timelines may vary depending on the intricacy of the design and the availability of artisan-made components. Customised hampers and bulk orders generally take 2 weeks to 1 month, depending on the level of personalisation. Once your order is dispatched, you will receive tracking details via email or WhatsApp. We currently deliver across India; for international shipping enquiries, please get in touch.
settings.care_text: Wipe the wooden chest with a dry cloth. Keep away from direct moisture to preserve the hand-carving and finish — each chest is a keepsake meant to last for years.
settings.notes_sub: Weddings · Housewarming · Anniversaries · Festive Gifting · Corporate Gifting · Special Celebrations
settings.notes_body:
Whether gifted for weddings, festive celebrations, anniversaries or milestones, The Heritage Chest is an invitation to slow down, celebrate craftsmanship, and gift with intention.

Every piece has been chosen for the story it carries — from skilled hands across India to the home of someone special. Masterfully handcrafted and soulfully curated to ensure your gift leaves a legacy far beyond the moment.
